---
title: "Parts of Zebang Zhang's resume"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

# These are some parts of Zebang Zhang's resume

The first part is **Professional Experience** of Zebang. If you are interested, go to [this page](professional_experience.html).

The second part is **Project Experience**. If you are interested, visit [this page](project_experience.html).

The third part is **Publication**. If you want to view it, click on [this page](publication.html).

Additionally, there is a [dashboard](dashboard.html) showing some plots.

Click on [the envelope icon](email.html) to view my email address.
